ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racers" (
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the racer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the racer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the racer is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the racer is based */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the racer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the racer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("racer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Engine size of the car */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date when the race is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race event */,
  "track_length" TEXT /* Length of the track */,
  "num_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race in which the result was recorded */,
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racer who participated */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car used in the race */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the race (e.g., TT2, TT3) */,
  "overall_best_time" TEXT /* Overall best time recorded by the racer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded based on race performance */,
  "fastest_lap" TEXT /* Fastest lap time recorded by the racer */,
  "avg_speed" TEXT /* Average speed of the racer during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_racer_id FOREIGN KEY ("racer_id") REFERENCES racers ("racer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_sponsorships" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car that is sponsored */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsor of the car */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id", "sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racing class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_participants" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race in which participants are racing */,
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racer participating in the race */,
  "qualification_time" TEXT /* Qualification time of the racer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id", "racer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lap_times" (
  "lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap time entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result in which the lap time was recorded */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lap_times_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "racer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racer who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_racer_id FOREIGN KEY ("racer_id") REFERENCES racers ("racer_id")
)
